title: Customizable Block Reach
description: A small mod that adds an in-game menu to customize your block reach
body:
This is just a small mod that adds an in-game menu with options for customizing your block reach. Sometimes 4.5/5 blocks of reach just isnt enough. Its super helpful when trying to build large-scale structures in Creative, or when theres just 1 log you cant reach.

The default keybind to open the block reach menu is M, but you can change it to whatever you feel like.

-See Gallery for images-
